items.str: B.E. Information Science student and software engineer building smart and scalable full-stack solutions that turn complex
YOLOv5, NLP, Machine Learning, Computer Vision
React, Three.js, YOLOv5, Node.js, Express, MongoDB
Developed a 3D virtual garden builder enabling users to upload real garden images, detect medicinal plants with 95%+
accuracy using YOLOv5, and visualize them in an interactive React + Three.js environment.
Built drag-and-drop layout and snap-to-grid features, improving placement speed by 60%.
Engineered Node.js + Express backend with MongoDB to persist user layouts and detection metadata.
Enhanced plant detection with AI-powered medicinal insights, reducing manual lookup time by 40%.
Cryptex Chat — AES-Based Text and File Encryption
Implemented a client-side AES-based encryption and decryption system for securely processing text messages and
user-uploaded files directly in the browser.
Built interactive React components to handle encryption workflows and encrypted output rendering.
Enabled secure handling of multiple data types using browser-native cryptography.
Created an offline-friendly NLP chatbot trained on a 5,000+ entry medical dataset delivering 90%+ intent classification
Implemented preprocessing, intent handling, and custom response logic in Python.
Attended a 2-day intensive workshop focused on generative AI concepts, prompt engineering, and LLM applications.
Coordinated registration, logistics, and team communications; facilitated mentorship and schedules.
Participated in city-level and campus hackathons focused on rapid prototyping and problem solving.
Next-Gen AI Tools Workshop — Google Developer Student Club
